title: crepis chrysantha subsp. minor
intro: Crepis chrysantha subsp. minor, also known as the lesser hawk's beard or minor hawk's beard, is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, and it has been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Crepis chrysantha subsp. minor include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
